text: Being here, surrounded by dim blue lights, glass walls, and the persistent echo of 'it's really nice,' I sense an uncanny comfort in the repetition and the shadows. The modernity and sterility of the space leave me suspended between curiosity and slight alienation. I am both participant and observer, wondering at the purpose behind these surfaces, these glowing lines, these words. The darkness makes everything feel a bit more introspective, as if every detail waits to be discovered rather than simply seen.
